summary: Admin Traffic Analytics system fully tested. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all UI components (6 KPI cards, 2 charts, conversion funnel, system health, raw events table). Global tracking fires page_view events on navigation. Strategy view tracking works when clicking strategies on leaderboard.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/events accepts event payload with type and metadata, returns event_id
POST /api/admin/events tags demo mode events with metadata.demo=true
POST /api/admin/events works with Bearer auth token to set user_id
POST /api/admin/events works without auth (anonymous events, user_id=null)
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026&range=24h returns all 18 metric fields
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary returns 403 with wrong admin_key
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary works with different ranges (24h, 7d, 30d)
GET /api/admin/traffic/timeseries?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026&range=24h returns time-bucketed series
GET /api/admin/traffic/timeseries returns 403 with wrong admin_key
GET /api/admin/traffic/events?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 returns paginated events with total, page, pages
GET /api/admin/traffic/events supports type filter parameter
GET /api/admin/traffic/events pagination works correctly
GET /api/admin/traffic/events returns 403 with wrong admin_key
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true renders Traffic Analytics title and header
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows 6 KPI cards (Total Events, Unique Users, Page Views, API Calls, WS Connections, Demo Sessions)
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Page Views & API Calls chart
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Strategy Interactions chart
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Conversion Funnel section with upgrade prompts, checkout starts, checkout successes, and conversion rate
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows System Health section with latency and error count
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Raw Events table with type filter dropdown
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows range selector (24h, 7d, 30d) and Refresh button
Frontend global tracking: navigating to /dashboard?demo=true fires a page_view event visible in /admin/traffic
Frontend strategy_view tracking: visiting leaderboard and clicking a strategy fires strategy_view event
Navigation shows Traffic link when authenticated or in demo mode
critical_code_review_comments: traffic.py: Well-structured with proper admin key verification using _verify_admin helper
traffic.py: Good use of MongoDB aggregation pipelines for summary and timeseries data
traffic.py: Proper datetime serialization for JSON responses
tracking.js: Fire-and-forget pattern prevents tracking from blocking UI
tracking.js: Correctly tags demo mode events with metadata.demo flag
useTracking.js: Properly tracks page views on route changes using useLocation
AdminTrafficPage.jsx: Clean component structure with proper data-testid attributes for testing
AdminTrafficPage.jsx: Auto-refresh every 30 seconds implemented correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Traffic Analytics system fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/events (fire-and-forget event logging), GET /api/admin/traffic/summary (aggregated metrics), GET /api/admin/traffic/timeseries (time-bucketed charts), GET /api/admin/traffic/events (paginated raw events). All admin endpoints require admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 query param. Frontend: /admin/traffic?demo=true shows full dashboard with KPIs, charts, funnel, health, and event table. Global tracking via useTracking hook fires page_view on route changes. Events stored in MongoDB traffic_events collection.

features_tested.post_events_authenticated: PASS - Creates event with correct user_id from token
features_tested.events_pagination: PASS - Returns paginated events with total/page/pages
features_tested.frontend_charts: PASS - Page Views & API Calls and Strategy Interactions charts
features_tested.frontend_conversion_funnel: PASS - Shows upgrade prompts, checkout starts/successes, rate
features_tested.frontend_system_health: PASS - Shows latency and error metrics
features_tested.frontend_event_table: PASS - Shows raw events with type filter
features_tested.global_page_view_tracking: PASS - page_view events fired on navigation
features_tested.strategy_view_tracking: PASS - strategy_view events fired on leaderboard clicks
features_tested.navigation_traffic_link: PASS - Traffic link visible in demo mode
